en.text: adverb from a compound of G0001 (as a negative participle) and a presumed derivative of G4049; undistractedly, i.e. free from (domestic) solicitude

senses.gloss_en: adverb from a compound of G0001 (as a negative participle) and a presumed derivative of G4049; undistractedly, i.e. free from (domestic) solicitude
